data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of capturing pool/spa maintenance logs with signatures but did not provide any evidence confirming that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case outlines the need for these logs and signatures, yet there is no evidence of actual logs or signatures being captured or validated in the prior steps. This indicates a clear gap in the validation process for the specified requirement.
gaps: No evidence of pool/spa maintenance logs with service provider + host signatures being captured or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for pool/spa maintenance logs
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of maintenance logs and signatures.
